title: Natural dishwasher rinse aid
subtitle: White vinegar with lemon essential oil used as a rinse aid to prevent water spots on glassware
excerpt: White vinegar is an effective dishwasher rinse aid. Its mild acidity prevents hard water minerals from depositing on glass and breaks down limescale in the machine. Lemon essential oil adds fragrance that dissipates during the rinse cycle. Fill the rinse aid compartment as you would a commercial product.
sourceNotes: White vinegar dishwasher rinse aid use documented in natural cleaning literature and consumer testing guides.

recipe.batchNotes: Make in larger quantities and store in a bottle for refilling.
recipe.shelfLifeNotes: 12 months. White vinegar is highly stable. Discard only if the essential oil scent becomes unpleasant.

glossaryTerms.definition: The active component in white vinegar (typically 5%). It prevents mineral deposits (limescale and silicates from hard water) from bonding to glass during the final dishwasher rinse cycle.

A product added to the rinse aid compartment of a dishwasher to reduce surface tension of the rinse water, allowing it to sheet off glassware rather than forming droplets that leave spots when they dry.
Calcium and magnesium mineral deposits left on glassware when hard water evaporates. They appear as a white haze or spots. Acidic rinse aids prevent bonding of these minerals to the glass surface.

content.text: from forming on glassware during the final rinse. The lemon essential oil adds fragrance that fully dissipates during the hot rinse cycle and does not leave any scent on the dishes. Fill the dishwasher's rinse aid compartment with this blend in place of commercial rinse aid. Do not add to the detergent compartment. Shelf life is 12 months.

Combine white vinegar and lemon essential oil in the bottle and shake to mix. Fill the dishwasher's rinse aid compartment as you would with a commercial product. The machine will dispense it automatically during the final rinse cycle.
Store in the bottle at room temperature. Shake before each refill as the essential oil may separate. Shelf life is 12 months. The vinegar content makes this product exceptionally stable.
